history.content:
<thought>
I am at the left side of the top corridor, facing right (`>`). Moving forward would go into lava (`L`), so I need to change direction. The open path below is accessible by turning downward first.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at the left side of the map facing down. The cell directly ahead is open, but the goal is far to the lower-right, so I need to start by moving downward into the corridor while avoiding lava. Moving forward is the safest progress toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am near the lower-left area facing down. Since forward is blocked by a wall, I need to reorient to move right toward the open corridor and eventually the goal on the lower-right side. Turning left will face me right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right (`>`), and the goal `O` is to the lower-right of my position. The cell directly ahead is a wall of lava-danger area? Actually the immediate path to the right is blocked by `L`, so I should first turn downward to move along the safe open corridor.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am near the lower-left area, facing down. The goal `O` is on the right side of the map, so I need to start moving to the right. From facing down, turning left will face me right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing right in the third row near the left side. The goal O is near the bottom-right. The cell directly ahead is lava, so I cannot move forward. I should turn downward to find a safe path around the lava barrier.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am near the left side of the map, facing down (`v`). The goal `O` is in the lower-right area. Moving downward is blocked by lava or walls in this column, so I should first turn to face right and then proceed along the open corridor toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing left (`<`) and the goal `O` is to my lower-right. The cell directly to my left is a lava cell, so I should not move forward. I need to turn to face downward first so I can navigate toward the goal safely.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at the left side of the map facing up (`^`). The goal `O` is in the lower-right area. The cell directly above me is a wall, so I should not move forward. To progress toward the open area, I need to face right first.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am near the left side of the map facing right (`>`). The goal `O` is in the lower-right area, and the path along my row is blocked by lava, so I should first move right until I can navigate downward and around the lava to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
